title: Multi Ore+
description: Adds a new ore that drops a random ore item when mined, making mining more fun and unpredictable. ⛏️
body:
**⛏️ Multi Ore+ Mod**

Multi Ore+ adds a brand-new mysterious ore to Minecraft that rewards miners with a surprise every time! When mined, this special ore drops a random ore item, making mining more exciting and unpredictable.

Whether you’re exploring caves or strip-mining deep underground, you never know what you’ll get — from common resources to valuable treasures.

**🔹 Features**

Adds a new Multi Ore block to the game

Mining the ore drops a random ore item

Perfect for variety, challenge, and loot-focused gameplay

Lightweight and easy to add to any modpack

Bring some RNG fun into your world and turn every mining trip into a gamble with Multi Ore+! 🎲⛏️
